title: Live Theatres Tracker
description: Live operating theatre activity by theatre and session.

inputs.name: case_start
inputs.description: Start timestamp for the case. Use null when a case has not yet started.

inputs.name: case_end
inputs.description: End timestamp for the case. Use null when the case is still in progress.

inputs.name: case_status
inputs.description: Current case status used for bar colour, for example Complete or In Progress.

inputs.name: case_procedure
inputs.description: Procedure or case label shown in the case tooltip.

inputs.name: session_start
inputs.description: Planned session start timestamp for the theatre session band.

inputs.name: session_end
inputs.description: Planned session end timestamp for the theatre session band.

inputs.name: session_theatre
inputs.description: Theatre or lane name shown on the y-axis.

inputs.name: session_key
inputs.description: Session identifier shown in the session band tooltip, for example THR1_AM or THR1_ALLDAY.

inputs.name: last_refresh_dttm
inputs.description: Timestamp of the latest data refresh. Used to position the vertical live-status marker and cap in-progress cases.
